description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the node:6 Docker image and runs a global before_script to quietly update apt, install python2.7, python2.7-dev, build-essential, make, gcc, g++, libicu-dev, set npm progress to false and install npm dependencies silently. Add a deploy job that is limited to the master branch. In the deploy job run npm run build, then quietly install ruby and ruby-dev via apt, delete the node_modules directory, install the dpl gem, and finally execute dpl --provider=heroku --app=moon-video-sync-api --api-key=$HEROKU_API_KEY --skip_cleanup to deploy to Heroku. No caches, artifacts, or additional services are defined.
